multiSeason.estimateNote: ~ = estimate based on a status-quo assumption (same roster, sponsor, and 25% loan-decay per season).

onboardingComplete.title: You're ready — the basics are done
onboardingComplete.body: All four getting-started steps are checked off. Next phase is building your team across multiple seasons — follow Deadline Day, deliver on the board's targets, and fight for promotion.
